name: Space Shuttle Challenger Crew
title: Space Shuttle Challenger Crew - taken 1/28/86 - died later that day on 1/28/86
description: Space Shuttle Challenger Crew - taken 1/28/86 - died later that day on 1/28/86
bio: The Space Shuttle Challenger crew consisted of seven astronauts, including teacher Christa McAuliffe, who perished when the shuttle broke apart 73 seconds after launch on January 28, 1986.
